response.justification: Candidate vastly exceeds the seniority bar — this is a Staff/Senior engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for a junior/mid role. Strong technical match on TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, Kubernetes, and AI tooling, but overqualification raises serious concerns about retention, salary expectations, and engagement with entry-level work. Additionally, candidate is listed in San Francisco while role requires high on-site presence (presumably Germany), and PostgreSQL experience is absent (MongoDB-heavy background).
strengths: Deep fullstack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS far exceeding role requirements
Demonstrated experience with AI/LLM agent infrastructure and MCP tooling — matches nice-to-have
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture) aligns with team values
concerns: Severely overqualified — Staff/Senior engineer applying for entry-level role suggests retention risk
Location mismatch: based in San Francisco, but role demands high on-site presence (likely Germany)
Database stack leans MongoDB; no demonstrated PostgreSQL experience for a Postgres-preferred role

key_factors.factor: On-site location mismatch (SF vs. required on-site)
